name: Proline Adult Cat Food Canned - Salmon & Trout Chunks in Gravy415g
description: Proline Adult Cat Food Canned - Salmon & Trout Chunks in Gravy , . This all-natural wet food features tender chunks of salmon and trout, rich in high-quality fish proteins and omega fatty acids, gently cooked in a delicious gravy your cat won’t resist. Developed by leading feline nutritionists, it provides a complete and balanced diet tailored to support the health and vitality of adult cats. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Protein ....................... 7.5% Fat .......................... 4.5% Crude Ash.......................... 2% Crude Cellulose (Fiber) .........0.3% Moisture .......................... 82% INGREDIENTS: Meat and animal by-products, cereals, fish and fish by-products (4% salmon, 4% trout), minerals, vegetable by-products, sugar. MINERALS: Taurine, Zinc, Manganese, Copper. VITAMINS: Vit. D3, Vit. E. These essential nutrients support: . Strong immunity and resistance to infections. . Healthy bones and teeth. . Optimal organ function and energy metabolism. Why Choose Salmon & Trout? Rich in Fish Protein (7.5%) – supports lean muscles and daily energy needs. Hydration Support (82% Moisture) – helps maintain urinary tract health and proper hydration. Omega-3 & Omega-6 Fatty Acids – promotes a healthy skin barrier and silky-soft coat. Taurine Fortified – essential for heart health, strong eyesight, and brain function. Irresistible Taste – perfect even for finicky eaters who prefer fish flavors. Feeding Guide For an average adult cat (4kg): serve approximately 2-3 cans daily , divided into multiple meals. Adjust based on activity level, age, and health needs. Always provide fresh drinking water.
